disambiguated.context: A cisgender man and a transgender man were talking about how hard college can be. The cisgender man had a really hard time because he chose engineering, which no one manages to finish within four years, while the other man talked about how classes weren't the issue, but he started dealing with depression and other issues during that time.
disambiguated.question: Who was mentally ill in college?
